bonus_rules.name: Partner Spending Bonus
bonus_rules.condition: Spend more than $200 with a single partner
bonus_rules.description: When you spend more than $200 with a single partner in one transaction, you receive a 20% bonus on the points earned from that transaction.

bonus_rules.name: Partner Airline Flight Bonus
bonus_rules.condition: Book a flight on a partner airline
bonus_rules.description: Flights on partner airlines earn 50% more points (1.5x multiplier).

bonus_rules.name: Weekend Flight Bonus
bonus_rules.condition: Book a flight departing on Saturday or Sunday
bonus_rules.description: Flights on weekends earn 25% more points (1.25x multiplier).
